email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van orderpicker bij Katoen Natie via Synergie. Ik heb al ervaring in uw magazijn (2025–2026) en ken de hoge standaarden van nauwkeurigheid en veiligheid. Daarnaast ben ik gemotiveerd om mijn logistieke vaardigheden verder te ontwikkelen in een 2-ploegenstelsel.

Mijn achtergrond in digitale marketing en webontwikkeling heeft mij geleerd om gestructureerd en detailgericht te werken – kwaliteiten die ook in de orderpick essentieel zijn. Ik spreek Engels en Turks vloeiend, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen).

Ik ben fysiek fit, flexibel inzetbaar en klaar om snel te starten. Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the order picker position at Katoen Natie via Synergie. I already have experience in your warehouse (2025–2026) and know the high standards of accuracy and safety. Moreover, I am motivated to further develop my logistics skills in a two-shift system.

My background in digital marketing and web development has taught me to work in a structured and detail-oriented way – qualities that are also essential in order picking. I speak English and Turkish fluently, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons).

I am physically fit, flexible, and ready to start quickly. I look forward to explaining my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor orderpicker bij Katoen Natie, via Synergie. Ik heb al ervaring in uw magazijn (2025–2026) en ken de hoge standaarden van nauwkeurigheid, veiligheid en teamwerk. Deze functie sluit perfect aan bij mijn hands-on mentaliteit en mijn wens om een stabiele carrière in de logistiek op te bouwen.

In mijn vorige rol bij Katoen Natie heb ik geleerd om efficiënt en accuraat te werken in een hoogvolume omgeving. Ik ben gewend aan fysiek werk, sta stevig in mijn schoenen en ben flexibel inzetbaar voor het 2-ploegenstelsel. Mijn oog voor detail en kwaliteit zorgt ervoor dat orders foutloos worden gepickt en verpakt.

Daarnaast breng ik een unieke combinatie van logistieke ervaring en technische vaardigheden mee. Als junior digital marketer werk ik met data-analyse, gestructureerd werken en continue verbetering – eigenschappen die ook in de orderpick van pas komen. Ik spreek Engels en Turks vloeiend, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen).

Ik ben gemotiveerd om door te groeien binnen Katoen Natie en bij te dragen aan een veilige, efficiënte werkomgeving. Ik ben direct beschikbaar en kijk uit naar een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the order picker position at Katoen Natie, via Synergie. I already have experience in your warehouse (2025–2026) and know the high standards of accuracy, safety, and teamwork. This role perfectly matches my hands-on mentality and my desire to build a stable career in logistics.

In my previous role at Katoen Natie, I learned to work efficiently and accurately in a high-volume environment. I am used to physical work, have a steady attitude, and am flexible for the two-shift system. My eye for detail and quality ensures that orders are picked and packed without errors.

Additionally, I bring a unique combination of logistics experience and technical skills. As a junior digital marketer, I work with data analysis, structured work, and continuous improvement – qualities that are also useful in order picking. I speak English and Turkish fluently, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons).

I am motivated to grow within Katoen Natie and contribute to a safe, efficient working environment. I am immediately available and look forward to an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025–2026) – familiar with the company's standards
Physically fit, comfortable standing/walking/lifting, and flexible for 2-shift system
Detail-oriented and accurate – proven in both logistics and digital work
Reliable, punctual, and team-oriented with a hands-on mentality
Basic Dutch (B1) and fluent English – good communication in a multicultural environment
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, and hands-on warehouse experience at Katoen Natie. Combines a detail-oriented, accurate work ethic with physical fitness and flexibility for shift work. Motivated to build a stable logistics career in a fast-paced, multicultural environment. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Warehouse & logistics: order picking, accuracy, quality control, safety compliance, teamwork
- Physical fitness: comfortable standing, walking, and lifting throughout shift
- Flexibility: available for 2-shift system (early and late)
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- Detail-oriented & reliable: proven in both logistics and digital roles
- Quick learner: picks up new tools and processes rapidly

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Followed safety protocols and collaborated with team members across shifts

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
